rule_metadata.name: ldifde
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'ldifde' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule ldifde
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'ldifde' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "ldifde"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /ldifde\.exe\s\-f\s.{0,1000}\\temp\\.{0,1000}\.txt\s\-p\ssubtree/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
